New 2026 Model — GPX Racing Thailand

DEMON 250

Born on the track. Bred for the streets. The GPX Demon 250 redefines what a 250cc machine can be — twin-cylinder fury wrapped in aggressive bodywork.

Engineering

Built Different

Every component engineered for a single purpose — dominating every curve, every straight, every ride.

01

Parallel Twin

249cc parallel-twin engine delivering visceral torque across the entire rev range. Smooth power delivery with aggressive top-end pull.

02

Fuel Injection

Advanced EFI system with dual throttle bodies for razor-sharp throttle response in any condition — hot or cold starts every time.

03

KYB Suspension

KYB inverted front forks with preload and rebound adjustment. Mono-shock rear with linkage delivers planted, confidence-inspiring handling.

04

Race ABS

Bosch single-channel ABS tuned for sporty riding. Programmable for track use — the confidence to brake later and harder.

05

Full LED

Full LED lighting system — from the distinctive twin-projector headlights to LED tail, running lights, and turn signals.

06

TFT Display

5-inch full-color TFT instrument cluster with smartphone connectivity, lap timer, multiple display modes, and shift indicator.

Technical

Specifications

Engine249cc Parallel Twin
Max Power28 HP @ 10,500rpm
Max Torque22 Nm @ 8,500rpm
Transmission6-Speed Manual
Top Speed155 KM/H
Dry Weight158 KG
Fuel Capacity12 Litres
FrameSteel Trellis
